# Lewis Hadden — Freelance Senior Full Stack Developer

> Senior full stack developer specialising in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js and Azure, based in Peterborough, UK. 9+ years' experience delivering large-scale web apps for IBM, ADP, ERGO and more. Available for remote and on-site work across the UK and Europe.

## About

Lewis Hadden is a highly experienced senior full stack engineer based in Peterborough, UK. He has been working in the web development industry for almost 9 years, leading development teams for large-scale projects and working as an independent developer on both in-house and public-facing products. He is currently seeking opportunities as a Senior or Lead Full Stack Developer, either as a freelancer or under permanent employment.

## Contact

## Experience

### ADP — Senior Full Stack Engineer (Contractor)
*Jan 2025 – Present*
React, Tailwind CSS, Cypress, Webpack, React Testing Library, JavaScript, REST API, Jest, Virtual Machines

### ERGO Travel Insurance — Lead Full Stack Engineer
*Apr 2024 – Nov 2024*
Next.js, Azure, React, TypeScript, CSS Modules, Function Apps, Cosmos DB, Event Hubs, Blob & Table Storage, DevOps Pipelines, Docker, Node.js, Jest

### Sopra Steria — Cloud Infrastructure Architect
*Jun 2023 – Dec 2023*
Azure, REST API, Cosmos DB, Serverless Function, Content Delivery Network, Blob Storage

### Sopra Steria — Lead Software Engineer
*Aug 2022 – Apr 2023*
Angular 8+, React, Flutter, TypeScript, Node.js, HTML5, SCSS / CSS3, Jest, PowerBI, Split Tunnelling (VPN)

### IBM — Senior Full Stack Developer
*Jan 2022 – Jul 2022*
React, Redux, TypeScript, AWS, JavaScript, Node.js, Carbon Design System, HTML5, SCSS / CSS3, Jest + Enzyme, CloudFormation, DynamoDB, CodeCommit, CodeBuild, CodePipeline, Lambda, EC2, S3, API Gateway, IAM, JIRA

### IBM — Lead Front End Developer
*Jan 2021 – Jan 2022*
React, Redux, TypeScript, AWS, HTML5, SCSS / CSS3, Jest + Enzyme, Micro-Frontends, Carbon Design System, FeatureHub, GitHub Workflows, Adobe Experience Manager, Adobe Launch, JIRA

### IBM — Front End Developer
*Aug 2018 – Jan 2021*
React, Redux, TypeScript, Adobe Experience Manager, JavaScript, Webpack, Babel, HTML5, SCSS / CSS3, Jest + Enzyme, Carbon Design System, Adobe Dynamic Tag Manager, Cookie Control (CIVIC), Docker, Linux / Bash, Apache, AWS

### IBM — QA Tester
*Jan 2018 – Aug 2018*
Selenium, WebdriverIO, Cucumber / Gherkin, BrowserStack, Appium, Node.js, JIRA, React, JavaScript, HTML, CSS

## Projects

### ADP RUN (2025)
Working on the ADP RUN payroll and HR platform. Developing new features using React and Tailwind CSS with feature flags for a customisable user experience. Writing unit tests with Jest and React Testing Library, and e2e tests with Cypress.
Technologies: React, Tailwind CSS, Webpack, Cypress IO
URL: https://online.adp.com/signin/v1/?APPID=RUN&productId=80e309c3-70c3-bae1-e053-3505430b5495

### Sanctions Checker (2024)
A sanctions checking tool for an insurance MGA using the open sanctions public database. Backend consists of a daily job to update CosmosDB and an API for name-based searches. Frontend is a Next.js application.
Technologies: Next.js, Mantine UI, Azure, Azure CosmosDB, Serverless Functions, DevOps Pipelines, Azure Object Storage, Node.js, REST API
URL: https://sanctions-checker.etisolutionshub.co.uk

### Oralieve (2024)
Shopify development for Oralieve's dental professional products store, including a patient samples form and minimum spend free shipping feature.
Technologies: Shopify
URL: https://www.oralieve-direct.co.uk/

### AirDoctor Webhook (2024)
Architected, developed and deployed a webhook for ERGO Travel Insurance that ingests and processes insurance claims from the AirDoctor platform. Built a Docker stack with local Azure emulators for local development.
Technologies: Azure, Azure Storage (Blob / Tables), Serverless Functions, DevOps Pipelines, Event Hubs, Node.js, Webhooks, Docker

### Audi Form Builder (2021)
Led a development team to create an advanced capability allowing content editors to drag and drop React micro-frontends to create custom forms on the Audi website without writing code.
Technologies: React, TypeScript, Redux
URL: https://www.audi.co.uk/uk/web/en/call-me-back.html

### Cookie Control (2018)
Designed and implemented the Cookie Control system for the Audi UK website for GDPR compliance using Adobe Launch to control third-party tracking tags and custom analytics.
Technologies: JavaScript, Adobe Analytics

### Audi Digital Transformation (2018)
Led front-end development and was pivotal in modernising Audi UK's technology infrastructure, migrating their legacy tech stack to AWS and overhauling their website with new SPAs.
Technologies: React, TypeScript, AWS

### Traffic Management Portal (2022)
Bespoke real-time traffic monitoring, reporting and management dashboards for the Singapore Land Traffic Authority (LTA).
Technologies: Angular, TypeScript, SCSS

### Audex (2022)
Architected and developed the front-end foundations for the Analyse module of Audex, an online media visualisation and analysis portal. Built a PowerBI POC demonstrating real-time analysis data in React.
Technologies: React, TypeScript, PowerBI
URL: https://audex.media/welcome

### Home Greening Microsite (2023)
Sole cloud architect for a proposed new microsite for UK Power Networks, designing Azure infrastructure compliant with strict enterprise security requirements.
Technologies: Azure, REST API, Cosmos DB

## Skills

- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Redux, HTML5, SCSS, CSS Modules, Tailwind CSS, Angular 8+, Flutter, Storybook, Webpack, Babel, Vite
- **Testing:** Jest, Enzyme, Cypress, React Testing Library, Selenium, WebdriverIO, Cucumber / Gherkin, BrowserStack, Appium
- **Backend:** Node.js, Bun, REST API
- **Databases:** MongoDB, Cosmos DB
- **Cloud:** AWS, Azure, Azure Functions, Azure DevOps, Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD Pipelines
- **CMS & Analytics:** Adobe Experience Manager, Adobe Dynamic Tag Manager, Shopify
- **UI Libraries:** Mantine UI, Bootstrap, Carbon Design System, Material UI
- **Tools:** Git, JIRA, Notion, Linux, Bash, Apache, NGINX, PowerBI
